series_metadata.series_description: Contain Medicaid recipient information with protected health information as defined by the Health Insurance Portability and Accountability Act (HIPAA) OF 1996. Protected information includes patient name, diagnosis, recipient number, birthdate and social security number. The workpapers also include schedules, analysis, transcripts, memoranda and other documents prepared by or for the Auditor of State during the examination of Medicaid cases.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: from release date ; Paper: while needed
